name: Spruce Ridge Resources Ltd.
summary: Spruce Ridge Resources Ltd., an exploration-stage company, engages in the acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral properties. It explores for gold, copper, and zinc deposits. The company holds a 100% interest in the Great Burnt copper gold property covering an area of 12 kilometers located in central Newfoundland. It also holds an option to acquire interests in the Nora Lake gold property situated in Ontario; and the Viking/Kramer gold properties located in Western Newfoundland. The company was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in Puslinch, Canada.
